endpoints.name: POST /v1/urlInspection/index:inspect
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/urlTestingTools/mobileFriendlyTest:run
endpoints.description: Runs Mobile-Friendly Test for a given URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /webmasters/v3/sites
endpoints.description: Lists the user's Search Console sites.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl.

endpoints.name: PUT /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}
endpoints.description: Adds a site to the set of the user's sites in Search Console.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl.

endpoints.name: DELETE /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}
endpoints.description: Removes a site from the set of the user's Search Console sites.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl.

endpoints.name: POST /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/searchAnalytics/query
endpoints.description: Query your data with filters and parameters that you define. Returns zero or more rows grouped by the row keys that you define. You must define a date range of one or more days. When date is one of the group by values, any days without data are omitted from the result list. If you need to know which days have data, issue a broad date range query grouped by date for any metric, and see which day rows are returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl.

endpoints.name: GET /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/sitemaps
endpoints.description: Lists the [sitemaps-entries](/webmaster-tools/v3/sitemaps) submitted for this site, or included in the sitemap index file (if `sitemapIndex` is specified in the request).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl.

endpoints.name: GET /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/sitemaps/{feedpath}
endpoints.description: Retrieves information about a specific sitemap.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl. Replace {{FEEDPATH}} with a real feedpath.

endpoints.name: PUT /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/sitemaps/{feedpath}
endpoints.description: Submits a sitemap for a site.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl. Replace {{FEEDPATH}} with a real feedpath.

endpoints.name: DELETE /webmasters/v3/sites/{siteUrl}/sitemaps/{feedpath}
endpoints.description: Deletes a sitemap from the Sitemaps report. Does not stop Google from crawling this sitemap or the URLs that were previously crawled in the deleted sitemap.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITEURL}} with a real siteurl. Replace {{FEEDPATH}} with a real feedpath.
